evidence.summary: Temporary-root transcript: first candidate search returned candidate_groups with exact_or_structured shown=2 hasMore=true; node dist/cli.js --json --group-candidates @payload.json returned candidate_groups exact_or_structured shown=2 hasMore=true and next offset=4. Source: src/cli.ts, src/help.ts, test/cli.test.ts, R-011 regression script.

node dist/cli.js --json --group-candidates @invalid-group.json exits 1 with empty stdout and stderr JSON error.code invalid_group_followup, invalidField groupCandidates.fingerprint, correctedShape, and suggestedCommand containing --group-candidates @payload.json. Source: src/cli.ts, R-011.

node dist/cli.js "auth token timeout" --mode canddiates --json exits 1 with empty stdout and stderr suggesting --mode candidates plus the exact command agent-session-search 'auth token timeout' --mode candidates --json. Source: src/cli.ts and test/cli.test.ts.

curl installer updated /home/ben/.local/bin/fff-mcp to 0.9.5; fff-mcp --version reports 0.9.5; npm run check:fff reports recommended stable FFF MCP v0.9.5, live grep passed, multi_grep supported, recall equivalence passed. Source: src/fff-preflight.ts, scripts/postinstall.mjs, README.md, docs/troubleshooting.md, tests.

node dist/cli.js capabilities emits JSON with tool agent-session-search version 0.5.2; node dist/cli.js sources emits JSON command sources. Help now documents sources [--json] and capabilities [--json]. Source: src/help.ts and test/cli.test.ts.
